description_long: This is a pair of tall, freestanding shelving units made from light-colored wood, each featuring five open shelves and a single lower compartment with a hinged door. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample vertical storage for books, decor, or other items. The units stand on short, dark-colored legs that elevate them slightly off the ground, giving a modern and airy appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, lending a natural and warm aesthetic. One of the lower compartments is shown with its door open, revealing additional enclosed storage space. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A pair of tall, light wood shelving units with five open shelves and a lower compartment with a hinged door, standing on short dark legs. The design is minimalist and modern, with visible wood grain and ample storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shelving units, with five open shelves each and one lower compartment door open, revealing interior storage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the units and the protruding lower compartment door on one unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted wood backs of both shelving units and the dark legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and the open lower compartment door from the other side.
